name: receipts
description: The Gates (G0-G10) agent adapter: make an AI fix verifiable, not just claimed. The agent carries a red->green receipt and fixes the surface the reporter sees, sweeps the twins, verifies dependents, builds on a fresh base, and stays compatible across the deploy window - applied in any medium (web / API / library / CLI / data / ...). Pairs with a Stop-hook backstop and verification memory.
